name: AIBOM: emitted SBOM includes the CycloneDX AI/ML extension under components[].mlModel or modelCard per the standard
command: mkdir -p compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json --include-models claude-opus,claude-sonnet && grep -E "\"modelCard\":" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
